title: Package name com.example.nie must change before shipping
description: The Android package identifier is com.example.nie — the default Flutter template name. When any user installs this APK, their data (SharedPreferences, databases) is stored under this path. Changing the package name later is a breaking change: existing installs lose all data on upgrade. Play Store and F-Droid both require a stable, non-example package name. This must be decided and set before the first public install — after that it cannot change without a migration. Suggested: io.nie.app or com.nie.app. All occurrences are in AndroidManifest.xml, build.gradle, and the Kotlin package declarations.
